Content: # Metronome > [!IMPORTANT] > This app is superseded by [https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome](https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome) Simple metronome app. [](https://f-droid.org/packages/de.moekadu.metronome/) [](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.moekadu.metronome) | ![screenshot-0](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/00.png) | ![screenshot-1](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/01.png) | ![screenshot-2](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/02.png) | ![screenshot-3](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/03.png) | ![screenshot-4](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/04.png) | |-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| # Functionality This app provides basic functionality like: * Setting speed manually or by "tap in" * If you use "tap in" while the metronome is running, the klicks should lock in to your taps. * Choose different sounds and individually adapt the volume * Save and load your current settings * Choose between light and dark theme * Show a notification, which supports "start" and "stop" # Help me improving the app If you like this app, but have ideas for improvement or are annoyed by some behaviour, please let me know. **License:** [GPLv3](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0)
Translation: # Metronome > [!IMPORTANT] > This app is superseded by [https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome](https://codeberg.org/thetwom/metronome) Simple metronome app. [](https://f-droid.org/packages/de.moekadu.metronome/) [](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=de.moekadu.metronome) | ![screenshot-0](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/00.png) | ![screenshot-1](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/01.png) | ![screenshot-2](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/02.png) | ![screenshot-3](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/03.png) | ![screenshot-4](https://github.com/thetwom/toc2/blob/master/fastlane/metadata/android/en-US/images/phoneScreenshots/04.png) | |-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| # Functionality This app provides basic functionality like: * Setting speed manually or by "tap in" * If you use "tap in" while the metronome is running, the clicks should lock in to your taps. * Choose different sounds and individually adjust the volume * Save and load your current settings * Choose between light and dark theme * Show a notification, which supports "start" and "stop" # Help me improving the app If you like this app, but have ideas for improvement or are annoyed by some behavior, please let me know. **License:** [GPLv3](https://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0)
